title: The Calcination Log
description: The golem has been tested with 4 ingredients. Identify the animators and determine what potion their mix would produce.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing2: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing7: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive
  ing1: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing4: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive

Chest reacts to R+L. Ears react to B+S. Animation rule: Large reaction → '+', Small reaction → '−'. So animation ingredients must have R+ AND B−. Cross-reference with the mixing clues to identify those ingredients.
Animation ingredients: ing[2, 6] (Ppn, pNn). Mix: R+.
